# Plan — zustand-wrap

**Generated by:** `migration-plan` against `acture-output/diagnosis.md`.

## Decisions

| Question | Default | Chosen | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Id prefix | `app` | `app` | Standard convention. |
| Categories | `Notes`, `Settings` | `Notes`, `Settings` | Two natural domains. |
| State adapter | `acture-state-zustand` | `acture-state-zustand` | Host uses zustand vanilla. |
| Phase A scope | moderate (8–12) | moderate | All 8 candidates fit in Phase A; the app is small. |
| Surfaces in scope | palette only | palette only | MCP/AI deferred to a follow-on session. |

## Phase A — core wraps (this session)

| Order | Command id | Effort |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | `app.note.add` | 15 min |
| 2 | `app.note.toggleDone` | 5 min |
| 3 | `app.note.remove` | 5 min |
| 4 | `app.note.setDueDate` | 15 min |
| 5 | `app.settings.setTheme` | 5 min |
| 6 | `app.settings.setFontSize` | 5 min |

Then GRADUATE two:

| Order | Command id | Action |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 7 | `app.note.setBody` | wrap, then graduate — UI rewires to dispatch |
| 8 | `app.note.archiveDone` | wrap, then graduate — Settings button rewires |

**Total effort:** ~1 hour of agent work.

## Phase B (out of scope this session)

- Add `.describe()` to every param field (mostly done at wrap time anyway).
- Add when-clauses (`activeNote != null` for body / due-date edits) once the host has a "selected note" surface.
- Wire MCP server.
- Wire Vercel AI tool calling.

## Dependencies

- Wire palette only after ≥5 commands are registered (otherwise it looks empty). Met by Phase A.
- Graduate AFTER wrap, not before — the graduated commands need a registry-dispatched call site to replace the legacy direct-action call.
